subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Thy letter hath come into Our presence, and We have taken cognizance of its contents. We beseech God that He may assist thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله قد حضر کتابک تلقاء الوجه و اطلعنا بما فیه نسئل الله بان یوفقک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
